ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "component_type" TEXT /* Type of the component (e.g., resistor, capacitor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Part number assigned by the manufacturer */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the component was added to the system */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the component was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the component (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., setup time, hold time) */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the parameter (e.g., t, ds) */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the parameter */,
  "typ_value" REAL /* Typical value of the parameter */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the parameter */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of the parameter (e.g., ns, μs) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the parameter specification */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the parameter specification */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the parameter */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the parameter */,
  "last_updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging in */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for communication */,
  "role" TEXT /* User role (e.g., admin, engineer, technician) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_log" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table affected */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record affected */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_log_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
column_names: Type of the component (e.g., resistor, capacitor)
Part number assigned by the manufacturer
Date when the component was added to the system
Date when the component was last modified
Status of the component (e.g., active, deprecated)
ID of the component the parameter belongs to

Symbol of the parameter (e.g., t, ds)
Units of the parameter (e.g., ns, μs)
